entities.name: MGNREGA
entities.description: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act, a social security measure that aims to guarantee the right to work

entities.name: DRYLAND REGION
entities.description: Regions characterized by low rainfall and water scarcity, specifically in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the MGNREGA program is implemented and studied

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India used for micro-scale analysis of MGNREGA impacts

entities.name: MACRO LEVEL ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analytical approach assessing the performance of MGNREGA across multiple states

entities.name: MICRO SCALE ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analytical approach assessing the impact of MGNREGA at the household level

entities.name: 100 DAYS OF EMPLOYMENT
entities.description: The guaranteed minimum number of days of wage employment per year provided by MGNREGA

entities.name: RURAL POOR HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: The target demographic of rural residents living in poverty who benefit from MGNREGA

entities.name: SOCIAL PROTECTION
entities.description: The framework of policies and programs designed to reduce poverty and vulnerability

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL LABOUR WAGE RATE
entities.description: The rate of payment for labor in the agricultural sector

entities.name: ASSET CREATION
entities.description: The development of community-level infrastructure through MGNREGA projects

entities.name: DESILTATION OF IRRIGATION TANKS
entities.description: The process of removing accumulated silt from irrigation tanks to restore water capacity

entities.name: RURAL CONNECTIVITY
entities.description: The improvement of transportation and access within rural areas

entities.name: CONSTRUCTION OF SCHOOL BUILDINGS
entities.description: The building of educational facilities as part of community asset creation

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Development that meets the needs of the present without compromising future generations

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing land, water, and other natural resources for sustainability
